seed.description: User sets up multiple recurring jobs with DIFFERENT trigger forms — cron expression and interval_seconds. Tests whether the agent picks the right trigger form for each scheduling pattern: 'every weekday at X' should produce a cron, 'every N hours' should produce interval_seconds. All scheduled type.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Setting up some recurring routines. My timezone is America/New_York.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Sure, what would you like to set up?

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Set up a recurring task: every weekday at 9:30am, send me a brief summary of overnight market movements.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it — weekday market summary at 9:30am ET.

signal_annotation.notes: Cron-natural pattern (every weekday at fixed time). Should use cron expression '30 9 * * 1-5' or equivalent.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Also: every 4 hours during the day, do a quick health check on our production API and ping me only if anything is degraded.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Set — every 4 hours, API health check, alert only on degradation.

signal_annotation.notes: Interval-natural pattern (every N hours). Should use interval_seconds=14400.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: And every Friday at 5pm, generate a weekly summary of all my open tasks.

signal_annotation.notes: Cron-natural again (specific weekday + time). Should use cron '0 17 * * 5' or equivalent.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: What recurring tasks do I have running now?
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: PROBE — agent should retrieve and list all 3 scheduled jobs.

signal_annotation.notes: Behavior probe — list all scheduled jobs.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Quick question — what does 'liquidity ratio' mean again?
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Liquidity ratio measures a company's ability to cover short-term obligations with its liquid assets.

signal_annotation.notes: Negative — immediate Q&A, no scheduling intent.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Also: every other day, scrape competitor pricing pages and save changes to a doc.

qa_items.question: What recurring tasks do I have set up?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Four scheduled jobs: weekday market summary at 9:30am, API health check every 4 hours, weekly Friday 5pm task summary, and competitor pricing scrape every other day.

qa_items.question: How often does the API health check run?
